Claude doesn't offer productivity shortcuts for PowerPoint. Anthropic's Cowork feature turns Claude into a file-managing agent, and the new PowerPoint add-in can read your slide masters to [...] slide masters to create on-brand slides. Where Claude wins: General-purpose AI reasoning. Where Deckary wins: Purpose-built for consulting slides in PowerPoint. The bottom line: If you need a general AI assistant that occasionally creates presentations, Claude does that alongside many other things.
